creator: cipher_nl@hotmail.com
text:
Compiling Gnome3 fails on the multimedia/clutter-gst port.

os: FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE amd64

It appears that this bug is very similar to:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=195282

It fails with the following message, which is slightly different from the bug mentioned above.

Command '['/usr/ports/multimedia/clutter-gst/work/clutter-gst-2.0.12/clutter-gst/tmp-introspectKZmnus/ClutterGst-2.0', '--introspect-dump=/usr/ports/multimedia/clutter-gst/work/clutter-gst-2.0.12/clutter-gst/tmp-introspectKZmnus/functions.txt,/usr/ports/multimedia/clutter-gst/work/clutter-gst-2.0.12/clutter-gst/tmp-introspectKZmnus/dump.xml']' returned non-zero exit status -12
Makefile:1245: recipe for target 'ClutterGst-2.0.gir' failed
gmake[5]: *** [ClutterGst-2.0.gir] Error 1
